conference.name: Vietnam Investor Conference 2026
conference.tagline: 5 High-Conviction Ideas for the Next Cycle

companies.name: Vingroup JSC
companies.thesis: Vingroup's diversified ecosystem — spanning real estate, automotive (VinFast), and retail — positions it uniquely to capture Vietnam's rising middle-class consumption. Asset monetization pipeline and VinFast's global expansion provide multiple re-rating catalysts over 12–18 months.

companies.name: Military Commercial Bank
companies.thesis: MBB offers the most attractive risk/reward in the banking sector, trading at a significant discount to peers despite superior ROE and one of the cleanest balance sheets. Digital banking momentum (MB App) is driving low-cost deposit growth and fee income expansion.

companies.name: FPT Corporation
companies.thesis: FPT is Vietnam's premier tech exporter, with a fast-growing IT outsourcing business serving Japanese and US clients. AI-driven service upgrades and semiconductor education programs position FPT to capture the global tech supply chain shift into Vietnam.

companies.name: Hoa Phat Group
companies.thesis: HPG is Southeast Asia's largest steel producer and a direct beneficiary of Vietnam's infrastructure supercycle. Dung Quat Phase 2 coming online doubles hot-rolled coil capacity, enabling market share gains in the high-margin automotive steel segment.

companies.name: Vinhomes JSC
companies.thesis: Vinhomes controls Vietnam's most valuable residential land bank and operates the only township-scale master-planned communities in the country. Undersupply of quality housing in Hanoi and HCMC creates structural pricing power, while the social housing mandate opens a new volume segment.
risks: Policy risk on real estate lending
